title: Potatoman Seeks the Troof
description:
Список возможностей• Clever Movement. Test your dexterity with a wide variety of bullet-hell challenges and platforming

• Quick Thinking. Put your brain to the test against a number of odd puzzles and outlandish obstacles.

• Hunt the Troof. Take potatoman through strange landscapes and a surprisingly rich story as you hunt for the troof. 

Об игреPotatoman Seeks the Troof will put your reflexes and worldview to the test as you journey through scorching deserts, dark forests, busy cities, the tallest mountains and eventually your own potato-consciousness in search of the ultimate answer.

Precise PlatformingThink just as quickly as you move, dealing with unique challenges!

• Move your spudsy avatar in and out of obstacles paths! 

• Train your fingers to dodge rocks, eggs, and anything else thrown at you! 

• Run, run as fast as you can to find the troof!

Mind-Bending Challenges!Never take anything for granted in this strange landscape!

• Test your wits against ever-changing challenges with strange rules!

• Laugh alongside Potatoman at his bizarre and humorous journey!

• Prepare for outlandish adventures and an odd sense of peace that comes with finding the troof.

Join Potatoman on His Journey!Do you have what it takes to find the troof, little spud?
description_short: Test both mind, body and spirit in this surreal bullet hell platformer. Plum the depths of your potato-consciousness to overcome impossible challenges in search of the elusive, tantalizing TROOF.
